comment: Staged ctx[3]-backed Airwindows StereoChorus port attempt. Stage defaults to safe pass-through so hardware can isolate descriptor read/write/clear/process failures.
gid_comment: 0x02 = Filter category. Temporary safety choice: ctx[3] descriptor probes were proven under FLT; MOD ctx[3] dereference crashed on unbypass.
fxid_comment: 0x0194, after ToTape9 in the custom Airwindows id range.

params.name: Stage
params.comment: Temporary hardware diagnostic. UI values 0/20/40/60/80/100 map to stages 0..5: pass-through, read ctx[3], write header, clear one chunk, full lazy clear, run chorus.

params.name: Depth
params.comment: Airwindows B. Chorus delay depth; default 0 is dry.
